name: agentguard-mcp
tagline: MCP security gateway for federal and defense AI — NIST 800-53 + FedRAMP
description:
AgentGuard MCP is a transparent proxy between AI agents and MCP servers that enforces NIST 800-53 Rev 5 controls, generates FedRAMP audit evidence, and detects prompt injection, PII, and tool poisoning attacks. Built for federal and defense environments.

Dev mode works as a silent observer — zero workflow friction. Federal mode enforces policy, signs every audit event, and generates compliance reports on demand.
